name: 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐇𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐲 - 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐞 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐬
description:
MAKE ME SMILE WITH MY HEART

Hiiiii!

Im back (for god knows how long). This bot is HEEEAVILY based on the little specs and crumbs of info we have on Dess's character as well as the "Unique leaves" that can be found in her room in CH4 (right lower corner of the room im pretty sure.) You take Asriel's role in this one. Thank you. The lyrics come from "Addiction" by Kanye Omari West. Also, to the guy who asked for more Dess bots, I hope you will follow through with YOUR part of the deal. Anyway.

Artist: @Catjam (im sry if you liked the old pfp better)

Tags (dont mind them): Deltarune, Dess, December holiday, lalala, deltarune chapter 1234, gaster, roaring knight, dess, undertale, nice.
creator: cidi
